requirement_topic.en: MSTRD Conformity Documentation — MS/IEC 60335-2-24 Refrigerator Safety
requirement_topic.zh: MSTRD 符合性文件——MS/IEC 60335-2-24 冰箱安全
requirement_topic.zht: MSTRD 符合性文件——MS/IEC 60335-2-24 冰箱安全

summary.en: MSTRD (Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division, under MoST) sets Myanmar Standards and adopts IEC-based standards. For household refrigerators, the practical safety anchor is MS/IEC 60335-2-24, read with the general household-appliance safety standard. Myanmar standards are largely voluntary, but certain electrical categories and import channels may require conformity documentation, test reports, or certificates to support customs clearance, government procurement, or buyer due diligence. A Chinese exporter should prepare an importer-held technical file referencing MS/IEC 60335-2-24, appliance markings, instructions, rated voltage, plug or cord details, and R-600a safety data.
summary.zh: MSTRD（缅甸标准检测研究司，隶属科技部）制定缅甸标准并采用 IEC 基础标准。对家用冰箱而言，实际安全锚点为 MS/IEC 60335-2-24，并与家用电器通用安全标准配套使用。缅甸标准大多为自愿性，但特定电气类别和进口渠道可能要求符合性文件、检测报告或证书，以支持通关、政府采购或采购方尽职调查。中国出口商应准备由进口商保存的技术文件，引用 MS/IEC 60335-2-24，并包括器具标识、说明书、额定电压、插头或电源线细节及 R-600a 安全资料。
summary.zht: MSTRD（緬甸標準檢測研究司，隸屬科技部）制定緬甸標準並採用 IEC 基礎標準。對家用冰箱而言，實際安全錨點為 MS/IEC 60335-2-24，並與家用電器通用安全標準配套使用。緬甸標準大多為自願性，但特定電氣類別和進口渠道可能要求符合性文件、檢測報告或證書，以支持通關、政府採購或採購方盡職調查。中國出口商應準備由進口商保存的技術文件，引用 MS/IEC 60335-2-24，並包括器具標識、說明書、額定電壓、插頭或電源線細節及 R-600a 安全資料。

standards_or_laws: MS/IEC 60335-2-24 — Household and similar electrical appliances safety — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
MSTRD standards adoption and testing services — Ministry of Science and Technology

summary.en: China's refrigerator baseline is GB 4706.13 for household refrigerating-appliance safety and GB 12021.2 for refrigerator energy efficiency. GB 4706.13 is technically related to IEC 60335-2-24, but a China CCC certificate or GB report is not a Myanmar MSTRD certificate unless accepted by the importer or authority for the specific clearance channel.
summary.zh: 中国冰箱基线为 GB 4706.13 家用制冷器具安全及 GB 12021.2 冰箱能效。GB 4706.13 在技术上与 IEC 60335-2-24 相关，但中国 CCC 证书或 GB 报告并非缅甸 MSTRD 证书，除非进口商或主管机构在特定通关渠道中接受。
summary.zht: 中國冰箱基線為 GB 4706.13 家用製冷器具安全及 GB 12021.2 冰箱能效。GB 4706.13 在技術上與 IEC 60335-2-24 相關，但中國 CCC 證書或 GB 報告並非緬甸 MSTRD 證書，除非進口商或主管機構在特定通關渠道中接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators

gap.en: The shared IEC basis helps, but the procedural gap remains: Myanmar asks for Myanmar-facing documentation, not a bare China CCC file. Translate the safety evidence into an MS/IEC 60335-2-24 matrix, identify any national deviations or label differences, and keep the importer as the document holder. Where customs or a tender requests MSTRD testing or certificate evidence, arrange that before shipment rather than assuming China reports will clear automatically.
gap.zh: 共同的 IEC 基础有帮助，但程序性差距仍然存在：缅甸需要面向缅甸的文件，而不是单独的中国 CCC 文件。应将安全证据转换为 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 对照矩阵，识别任何国家差异或标签差异，并由进口商保存文件。如海关或招标要求 MSTRD 检测或证书证据，应在出货前安排，而不是假设中国报告会自动通关。
gap.zht: 共同的 IEC 基礎有幫助，但程序性差距仍然存在：緬甸需要面向緬甸的文件，而不是單獨的中國 CCC 文件。應將安全證據轉換為 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 對照矩陣，識別任何國家差異或標籤差異，並由進口商保存文件。如海關或招標要求 MSTRD 檢測或證書證據，應在出貨前安排，而不是假設中國報告會自動通關。

mandatory_status.target: Largely voluntary standards, but conformity documentation may be required for certain categories, customs channels, tenders, or buyers; verify MSTRD requirement before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic sale — GB 4706.13 safety baseline and GB 12021.2 energy baseline apply to covered household refrigerators

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Myanmar refrigerators, build the safety file around MS/IEC 60335-2-24 and hold it with the importer. China GB 4706.13 evidence is useful because of the IEC basis, but it should be mapped into Myanmar-facing documentation and cannot be assumed to replace any MSTRD request.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸冰箱安全文件应围绕 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 建立，并由进口商保存。中国 GB 4706.13 证据因其 IEC 基础而有用，但应映射为面向缅甸的文件，不能假定其可替代任何 MSTRD 要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸冰箱安全文件應圍繞 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 建立，並由進口商保存。中國 GB 4706.13 證據因其 IEC 基礎而有用，但應映射為面向緬甸的文件，不能假定其可替代任何 MSTRD 要求。

requirement_topic.en: MIC / Importer Documentation and Customs Routes — Yangon, Thilawa, Mandalay
requirement_topic.zh: MIC / 进口商文件及通关路线——仰光、迪拉瓦、曼德勒
requirement_topic.zht: MIC / 進口商文件及通關路線——仰光、迪拉瓦、曼德勒

summary.en: Myanmar market entry depends heavily on the local importer and the current import-licensing status of the refrigerator HS code. MIC (Myanmar Investment Commission) and the Ministry of Commerce framework can affect investment, import permissions, and importer status. Refrigerators commonly enter through Yangon or Thilawa seaport routes, or overland through Mandalay from Yunnan. The importer should confirm the HS code, import licence requirement, customs valuation file, certificate of origin, invoice and packing documents, MSTRD conformity evidence, warranty or service documents, and any energy or safety declarations requested by customs or the buyer.
summary.zh: 缅甸市场准入高度依赖当地进口商及冰箱 HS 编码的当前进口许可状态。MIC（缅甸投资委员会）及商务部框架可能影响投资、进口许可及进口商资格。冰箱通常经仰光或迪拉瓦海港路线进入，也可能从云南经曼德勒陆路进入。进口商应确认 HS 编码、进口许可证要求、海关估价文件、原产地证、发票和装箱文件、MSTRD 符合性证据、保修或售后文件，以及海关或采购方要求的任何能效或安全声明。
summary.zht: 緬甸市場准入高度依賴當地進口商及冰箱 HS 編碼的當前進口許可狀態。MIC（緬甸投資委員會）及商務部框架可能影響投資、進口許可及進口商資格。冰箱通常經仰光或迪拉瓦海港路線進入，也可能從雲南經曼德勒陸路進入。進口商應確認 HS 編碼、進口許可證要求、海關估價文件、原產地證、發票和裝箱文件、MSTRD 符合性證據、保修或售後文件，以及海關或採購方要求的任何能效或安全聲明。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Import and Export Law (2012) and Ministry of Commerce import notifications — verify HS code coverage
Myanmar Investment Law (2016) and MIC procedures — importer and investment context
Myanmar customs clearance practice for Yangon/Thilawa seaports and Mandalay overland entry

summary.en: China refrigerator files commonly include GB 4706.13 safety evidence, GB 12021.2 energy evidence, CCC or related domestic approvals, commercial invoice, packing list, customs declaration, and origin evidence. Those documents support export and buyer review, but Myanmar still requires importer-led import licensing and customs clearance under its own rules.
summary.zh: 中国冰箱文件通常包括 GB 4706.13 安全证据、GB 12021.2 能效证据、CCC 或相关国内批准、商业发票、装箱单、报关单及原产地证据。这些文件可支持出口和采购方审查，但缅甸仍要求由进口商按本国规则办理进口许可和通关。
summary.zht: 中國冰箱文件通常包括 GB 4706.13 安全證據、GB 12021.2 能效證據、CCC 或相關國內批准、商業發票、裝箱單、報關單及原產地證據。這些文件可支持出口和採購方審查，但緬甸仍要求由進口商按本國規則辦理進口許可和通關。

standards_or_laws: ASEAN-China Free Trade Agreement (ACFTA) — Form E preferential origin certificate where eligible

gap.en: The main gap is importer execution. A China export file is not enough without a Myanmar importer who can confirm import licensing, route-specific customs requirements, and whether ACFTA Form E or other origin documentation is needed for tariff treatment. Yangon/Thilawa and Mandalay overland entries may differ in broker practice, inspection requests, and document timing.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于进口商执行。仅有中国出口文件不足以完成准入，还需要缅甸进口商确认进口许可、路线特定通关要求，以及是否需要 ACFTA Form E 或其他原产地文件以享受关税待遇。仰光/迪拉瓦与曼德勒陆路入境在报关行实践、查验要求和文件时间点上可能不同。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於進口商執行。僅有中國出口文件不足以完成准入，還需要緬甸進口商確認進口許可、路線特定通關要求，以及是否需要 ACFTA Form E 或其他原產地文件以享受關稅待遇。仰光/迪拉瓦與曼德勒陸路入境在報關行實踐、查驗要求和文件時間點上可能不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the HS code or import notification requires a licence; importer of record and customs documentation are required in practice for all shipments
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory China export and product-documentation baseline applies as relevant; China domestic CCC or GB evidence does not replace Myanmar import licensing

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce, Republic of the Union of Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar refrigerator access is importer-led. Confirm HS-code licensing, customs route, origin documents, and MSTRD evidence before shipment; China CCC, GB 4706.13, and GB 12021.2 files help the dossier but do not replace Myanmar import clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸冰箱准入由进口商主导。出货前应确认 HS 编码许可、通关路线、原产地文件及 MSTRD 证据；中国 CCC、GB 4706.13 和 GB 12021.2 文件有助于资料包，但不能替代缅甸进口清关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸冰箱准入由進口商主導。出貨前應確認 HS 編碼許可、通關路線、原產地文件及 MSTRD 證據；中國 CCC、GB 4706.13 和 GB 12021.2 文件有助於資料包，但不能替代緬甸進口清關。
